samples.transcript: This song always reminds me of college, good times. Man, I feel old. Um, it's a little hot on my side, can you set the driver's temp to sixteen degrees?
The room is not really hot or cold, I just want that soft background fan sound to fall asleep, so, like, can you put the thermostat into Fan_Only mode
Last week I quit energy drinks cold turkey, which gave me headaches, and I am hoping my body is recovering, so can you grab my HRV for the last week so I can see if it is improving
